title: cli-opencode sandboxMode is declared supported by parseExecutorConfig but silently ignored by all 4 if_cli_opencode YAML branches
evidence: executor-config.ts:40 lists sandboxMode in EXECUTOR_KIND_FLAG_SUPPORT['cli-opencode']; spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml:787 hardcodes --dangerously-skip-permissions; line 801 note explicitly documents the gap
recommendation: Either remove sandboxMode from EXECUTOR_KIND_FLAG_SUPPORT['cli-opencode'] (parser then rejects like serviceTier) OR branch YAML on sandboxMode and refuse to dispatch when read-only is requested
scopeProof: All 4 deep-* YAML if_cli_opencode branches inherit the same hardcoded permission flag; comment at line 801 documents the gap

title: Zero unit-test coverage for cli-opencode in executor-config.vitest.ts
evidence: grep -c 'cli-opencode' executor-config.vitest.ts = 0; file has 24 cases for native/cli-codex/cli-gemini/cli-claude-code
recommendation: Add 4 cases mirroring cli-claude-code pattern: minimal accept, serviceTier reject, arbitrary-model accept, reasoningEffort flowthrough sanity
scopeProof: Full file read at lines 1-157 covers entire test suite
